w:r.w:t: IL will present demonstration in front of the Pupils; Pupils will play role model on above mentioned steps.
IL will present demonstration in front of the Pupils; Pupils will play role model on above mentioned steps.
IL will show the pictures of fruits for recognition.
IL will show pictures of fruits and Pupils will tell the winter and summer fruit.

and after that they will do their work independently.
. IL will mention the day and date on top of the page and check at the end.

around the area and calls them
not step on hoops or bean bags
and throw it into a hoop.
Repeat the game using different movements:
On which day do we celebrate Pakistan’s Independence Day?

Ans: There are 30 Fast in Ramadan.
Apple, Banana, Orange, Grapes and Watermelon.
